feed.title: AO3 - Jason Todd/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Jason Todd/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Baby’s First Creature-Feature
entry.summary:
Author: TheGoldenPath

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,631Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 60

Summary: She’s reading to him, a generator manual that looks well read. The pages are yellow and water stained around her long fingers. His vision lazily trails from the book to his bloodied sheets and back to the stranger. Is he hallucinating a comforting presence to make his reality less burdensome? When had his visions ever been pleasant?A pretty girl to sit by his bedside and comfort him in his death. It reminds him of the soft moments of peace in his childhood that he held onto with a white knuckled grip. It reminds him of the few moments his mother felt like a mother. He tries to reach out and touch her hand, just to see if she’s a fantasy meant to remind him of everything he never fully had only for the pain to jolt up his entire abdomen. That works too. He manages to stifle the pained groan that wants to shoot out from the simple motion.   You know those memes about y/n being a dark entity… just saying

entry.title: Put it on My Tab
entry.summary:
Author: Sicone

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,721Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 305

Summary: Everyone deserves time off, and the vigilantes of Gotham are no exception to the rule. So, the boys decide to take a weekend to let loose. Who knew a few drinks would lead to a stranger in bed?

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,929Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 508

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,457Chapters: 1/25Kudos: 9

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books.Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger as Red Hood the next day. Said owner's nickname upgrades then from snarky tea shop owner to cute tea shop owner.Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off.Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood.Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: Threads of Red
entry.summary:
Author: ddottodd

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,923Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 27

Summary: She’s the girl Gotham calls the “smiling, always positive nurse.” He’s the brooding vigilante in red, moving through the city’s shadows.When disaster strikes their worlds collide, he rescues, she heals. She tends to the frightened and injured, he fights to keep them alive.Two very different kinds of heroism. Two very different kinds of people. And somewhere between smoke, sirens, and the chaos of Gotham, something unspoken begins to grow.Can the girl who gives hope to everyone she meets reach the boy who trusts no one?

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 200Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 8

Summary: A new arrival alone in Gotham, you make a point of meeting new people and new potential hookups. Little did you know that all your potential dates knew each other. You find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, as are they, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue. - Titled edited. Originally 3300 word epilogue but decide to go for a 3500 for a nice clean 4k total.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Fall in love again and again
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,222Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Summary: just moments that made either them or you fall in love again and again.Characters: Bruce Wayne, Jason Todd, Tim Drake, Dick Graysonc/w: Food mentioned in Jason's part. reader is alluded to be a foodie in Jason's part.a/n: Maybe OOC. dick's part is kind of bad. but i kind of wanted to touch on that topic though, so I digress. Constructive criticisms appreciated. Will do for other characters as I read and know more . So some characters may seem OOC. Bruce's headcanon is based on the second episode of Justice League Unlimited, where he had to sing to save Diana.

entry.title: Loving Machine
entry.summary:
Author: Spenc56623

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,690Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 35

Summary: After a long night of work, getting home and finally relaxing, the one and only Red Hood falls into your apartment. Thinking it is his safe house, he is confused why you're here but when you notice him bleeding, your nurse instincts take over. Ignoring your fear, you patch him up. He leaves with A promise, threat, or warning, maybe even all three, that he will be back at some point in time.

entry.title: Only Yours
entry.summary:
Author: treeteaofversailles

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,847Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: You had to tell him. You needed to tell him. That was what you and he agreed on at the beginning of your relationship. That you’d tell each other everything and work on growing together instead of running from your feelings when it gets hard. You swallowed and looked at him. “Who’s Artemis?” ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ You get jealous of Artemis and your overthinking mind begins to spiral, unraveling your insecurities. You decide to confront Jason and he erases your worries.

entry.title: In the Lowlight
entry.summary:
Author: magpietendencies (writtenintostars)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,638Chapters: 5/38Kudos: 116

Summary: There’s nothing recognizable about Jason, except maybe the way he zeroes in on you the second you step into the room. He always treated you that way, like you were what he was waiting for, the only reason he even showed up. “Jason.” You say when you remember how to talk again. You’re vaguely aware that you’re digging your nails into your palms. You tell yourself to blink, your eyes beginning to water, but you can’t bring yourself to, afraid you’ll find that Jason won’t be there anymore. “Hey, Mags,” the figure greets you, and it’s the first time anyone’s called you that in years. It makes sense that it would be Jason who uses the nickname. He gave it to you, after all. ~ You and Jason Todd spent your teen years together under Batman's tutelage and Bruce Wayne's care, your bond going much further than any words can describe. Six years after his apparent death, Jason reappears, both of you angry and dejected, teeming with love you don't know what to do with. You missed each other. ~ Updates the first Monday of each month.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,811Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.
